---
title: "About"
---

This site is a collaborative project between Mike Young of Mike Young Academy, and data scientist Lasse Hjorth Madsen. The goal is to better understand the dynamics of networks, using social media as a proxy. Feel free to follow [Lasse](https://bsky.app/profile/lassehjorthmadsen.bsky.social) or [Mike](https://bsky.app/profile/mkeyoung.bsky.social) on Blue Sky Social for future opdates on the project.
